water_temp_read.read: Water is warming; trout may favor more oxygenated water.

light_pressure_read.read: Light and pressure do not strongly push the outlook either way.

stocking_read.read: Recent stocking supports eggs, worms, and attractor nymphs.

angler_analysis.expected_trout_behavior: Expect trout to favor the most comfortable feeding lanes while staying close to cover when light is high.
angler_analysis.presentation_style: Prioritize clean drifts, smaller natural patterns, and stocked-trout attractors where appropriate.

fly_reasoning.egg_pattern: Recent stocking makes eggs a logical confidence fly.
fly_reasoning.squirmy_worm: A simple stocked-trout attractor and good dirty-water option.
fly_reasoning.duracell: A strong attractor nymph when fish will move a little but are not fully aggressive.

generated_text.quick_read: The current trout fishing outlook for the Chattahoochee River is fair to good with warming water encouraging trout to seek oxygenated areas. Recent stocking supports strong action on stocked-trout attractors and egg patterns.
generated_text.best_window: Day 1 morning is best due to low wind, cool temperatures around 76°F, minimal sky cover, and near-zero rain chance creating stable, favorable conditions for active nymph fishing in riffles and runs.
generated_text.current_conditions: Water temperature is 62.8°F with a flow of 899 cfs and a gage height of 2.03 ft. Turbidity is low at 5.9 NTU, indicating clear water.
generated_text.weather_setup: The weather features mostly clear skies with 20% average sky cover, stable pressure at 30.05 inHg and neutral trend, westerly winds averaging 5.7 mph with gusts up to 17.3 mph, and minimal rain forecasted (0.02 inches max).
generated_text.what_this_means: Trout are likely positioned in riffles, pocket water, oxygenated runs, seams, and structure favoring feeding lanes with moderate light. Presentations should focus on clean drifts using smaller natural patterns and stocked-trout attractors. Use active and balanced nymph tactics early and late, with confidence in egg patterns, squirmy worms, and duracell flies. No specific cautions noted.
